action_text: Select "Short description" as the field for the first filter condition
rationale: We need to start building the filter by choosing the field to filter on; selecting "Short description" in the filter builder enables the operator and value inputs.

action_text: Open the Short description column options menu
rationale: Using the column options for Short description often provides direct filtering actions (e.g., Filter, Show Matching) that can quickly create the needed condition.

action_text: Show the column search row for the table
rationale: Enabling the column search row provides inline filters per column; this is another path to narrow the list by Short description.

action_text: Open the dropdown to choose the quick search field
rationale: As an alternative approach, switch the list’s quick search field to "Short description" so we can search for the target string directly.

action_text: Type "#SERIES-1f711cdf-2" into the list search box
rationale: If the quick search field is already set (or after setting it), entering the target text can immediately filter results to those containing the series string.
